name: Bairong Inc.
summary: Bairong Inc., a fintech application company, provides full lifecycle management services to financial institutions and offers financial products and services to private and small-micro enterprises in the People's Republic of China. It offers credit risk management, precision marketing, and insurance distribution products. The company is also engaged in micro-loan business, and insurance and reinsurance brokerage business. In addition, it provides development, consulting, and transfer services of software and hardware products, and network technology; data processing and big data services; enterprise credit services; technology development services; and financial information services. Further, the company is engaged in computer system development; and technology development, consulting, and promotion services. It provides its solutions to banks and insurance companies. Bairong Inc. was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
